political_to_nba.finding: P4 (LBJLincoln/political-alpha-4) achieved new all-time political best Brier 0.24902 using lightgbm at gen 29557. Previously used xgboost_brier.
political_to_nba.implication: LightGBM with large gen-count convergence outperforms xgboost_brier on high-dimensional tabular prediction. NBA S14 (random_forest, worst fleet at 0.22431) is the prime candidate to benefit from lightgbm mutation.
political_to_nba.recommendation: Send boost_mutation to S14 encouraging lightgbm exploration. S14 random_forest has plateau at 0.22431 across 800+ gens.

top_priorities.technique: Dual-ELO (regular-season vs playoff) + market-implied probability features
top_priorities.note: Pure feature addition — no model change. Top-3 SHAP contributor in Jan 2026 uncertainty-aware paper.
